source: Generated from audited BridgeBench, soak, public TerminalBench, repeated TerminalBench, and W&B receipts.

bridgeBench.summary: All pack · 42.11% mean token accuracy · score 42.11 · 1 eval sample

soak.summary: 30-minute bounded soak. 52/52 probes succeeded with 0 errors. OpenJaws p95 latency: 8455 ms. Direct OCI-Q p95 latency: 4254 ms.

terminalBench.summary: OpenJaws ran circuit-fibsqrt on OCI Q with 5 trials, 0 runtime errors, and 5 benchmark-failing trials. Mean reward: 0.0. The public task discussion is linked here.

terminalBenchSoak.summary: Repeated TerminalBench soak over terminal-bench/circuit-fibsqrt. 2 cycles produced 2 total trials, 0 runtime errors, and 2 benchmark-failing trials.

wandb.summary: A live W&B project target was configured for this benchmark pass, but no local WANDB login/API key was available, so the receipts stayed local only.
